levels.title: Week 1 Lesson 1: First Downbeat
levels.dialogue_pre: LEAH (DM): Name the dot. JACOB (PERC): Lock 8 counts.
levels.hint_text: LEAH: Set target_x=12 and target_y=11. JACOB: counts=8.
levels.dialogue_post: LEAH: Dot hit. JACOB: Time locked. That’s a clean rep.
levels.starter_code:
# WEEK 1 • LESSON 1: VARIABLES + COUNTS
# Goal: move DM to (12, 11) in 8 counts

# Leah: write the dot
target_x = 0  # TODO: set to 12
target_y = 0  # TODO: set to 11

# Jacob: call the move on an 8-count phrase
band.step_to(
    'DM',
    target_x,
    target_y,
    counts=8,
)

levels.title: Week 1 Lesson 2: Two-Move Phrase
levels.dialogue_pre: JACOB (PERC): Two phrases. Two hits. Total 16 counts.
levels.hint_text: Step DM to (12,11) in 8 counts, then to (20,11) in 8 counts.
levels.dialogue_post: JACOB: That split was clean. Two moves, same tempo.
levels.starter_code:
# WEEK 1 • LESSON 2: TWO MOVES
# Build a 16-count phrase for DM using 2 moves.

band.step_to('DM', 12, 11, counts=8)
# Add your second move here to reach (20, 11)

levels.title: Week 1 Lesson 3: Hold the Set
levels.dialogue_pre: LEAH (DM): Sometimes the cleanest move is staying still. Use wait().
levels.hint_text: Move DM, then wait(4), then finish the phrase. Total 16 counts.
levels.dialogue_post: LEAH: Nice. You held the form instead of wandering.
levels.starter_code:
# WEEK 1 • LESSON 3: WAIT (HOLD)
# Total phrase: 16 counts
# Must use band.wait() at least once.

band.step_to('DM', 12, 11, counts=8)
# Leah: hold the set
# band.wait(4)
# Finish the phrase to (20, 11)

levels.title: Week 1 Lesson 4: Hit the Mid-Dot
levels.dialogue_pre: LEAH: Hit the mid-dot at count 8. JACOB: Finish on count 16.
levels.hint_text: Count 8: DM at (12,11). Count 16: DM at (20,11).
levels.dialogue_post: LEAH: That’s control. JACOB: That’s tempo.
levels.starter_code:
# WEEK 1 • LESSON 4: CLEAN CHECKPOINTS
# Count 8: hit (12,11)
# Count 16: hit (20,11)

# Write your 16-count phrase here:

levels.title: Week 1 Battle: Invitational vs Copper Ridge
levels.dialogue_pre: JACOB: Lock in a 16-count phrase. Two moves. Exact timing.
levels.hint_text: LEAH: Step DM to (12,11) in 8 counts, then to (20,11) in 8 counts.
levels.starter_code:
# WEEK 1 BATTLE vs Copper Ridge
# Build a 16-count phrase for the DM.
# Must contain at least 2 separate moves.

band.step_to('DM', 12, 11, counts=8)
# Add your second move here to reach (20, 11)!
levels.opponent_code:
# Copper Ridge is sloppy.
band.step_to('DM', 20, 11, counts=16)  # One long, boring move.

levels.title: Week 2 Lesson 1: Set the Interval
levels.dialogue_pre: ALEXANDER (SAX): Horn lines look best when the interval is even. Let’s place a clean sax line.
levels.hint_text: ALEXANDER (SAX): Use a loop. Each i is a repeat. x = x0 + i*spacing.
levels.dialogue_post: ALEXANDER (SAX): Tight horn section. Same gap, same groove.
levels.starter_code:
# WEEK 2: LOOPS + INTERVALS
# Goal: Spawn W1..W5 on y=11 starting at x=14, spacing=2.
# Fix the spacing, then run.

y = 11
x0 = 14
spacing = 0  # TODO: set this to 2

for i in range(5):
    name = f"W{i+1}"
    band.spawn(name, section="WINDS", x=x0 + i*spacing, y=y)

levels.title: Week 3 Lesson 1: Lock the Tempo
levels.dialogue_pre: JACOB (PERC): We move on the click, not on vibes. Set your counts like a metronome.
levels.hint_text: DOMINIC (LOW BRASS): Use wait() to hold the pocket. Then move the next phrase on time.
levels.dialogue_post: JACOB (PERC): That was a clean split. No rushing, no dragging.
levels.starter_code:
band.step_to('W1', 16, 13, counts=4)
band.step_to('W2', 16, 15, counts=4)
# Percussion holds
band.wait(4)
# Swap: winds hold, percussion moves
band.step_to('P1', 16, 7, counts=4)
band.step_to('P2', 16, 9, counts=4)

levels.title: Week 4 Lesson 1: Dynamic Decision
levels.dialogue_pre: KYLE (HIGH BRASS): Power is useless if we collide. Make the smart call and keep the form clean.
levels.hint_text: KYLE (HIGH BRASS): If the lane is crowded, take more counts or go around.
levels.dialogue_post: KYLE (HIGH BRASS): That is leadership: adapt without panicking.
levels.starter_code:
tx, ty = 16, 11
# If the direct path is blocked, go around
if band.is_occupied(10, 11):
    band.step_to('B1', 10, 9, counts=4)
    band.step_to('B1', tx, ty, counts=4)
else:
    band.step_to('B1', tx, ty, counts=8)

levels.title: Week 5 Lesson 1: Visual Phrase
levels.dialogue_pre: ANNA (FLUTE): Music has phrases. So should drill. Build a move once, then reuse it.
levels.hint_text: MYLEE (GUARD): Wrap the arc into a function. Then the whole line can sweep together.
levels.dialogue_post: ANNA (FLUTE): Nice. Now we can build a whole show from a few good ideas.
levels.starter_code:
# WEEK 5: FUNCTIONS (PHRASES)
#
# Imports are blocked in the game sandbox.
# Use band.math for trig (sin/cos/radians).


# Make an arc helper built from step_to()
def arc_out(names, cx, cy, radius, start_deg, end_deg, counts):
    for i, name in enumerate(names):
        t = i / max(1, (len(names)-1))
        a = band.math.radians(start_deg + (end_deg-start_deg)*t)
        x = int(round(cx + band.math.cos(a)*radius))
        y = int(round(cy + band.math.sin(a)*radius))
        band.step_to(name, x, y, counts=counts)

arc_out(
    ['G1','G2','G3'],
    cx=14, cy=11,
    radius=4,
    start_deg=200, end_deg=340,
    counts=8,
)
